testcase.name: a configured binary that does not exist is a usage error(Path)
finding a crash still returns zero by default, and writes the crash(Path)
--help returns zero and prints to stdout()
a missing target config is a usage error reported to stderr(Path)
a run writes a parseable campaign-summary json to the output dir(Path)
--fail-on-crash returns the crash code when a crash is found(Path)
text mode writes the banner and result to stdout only(Path)
grammar mode with an unreadable grammar is a usage error(Path)
a target config missing required fields is a usage error(Path)
mutational mode with unreadable seeds is a usage error(Path)
a parse error returns the usage code and reports to stderr()
